title: Zyllion ZMA20 Luxury Shiatsu V-Spring Massager Pillow with Heat (Brown)- One Year Warranty

variation_files.prompt: A split-view product shot of the massager pillow in an open, upright position, revealing its internal structure. The exterior is made of brown leather-like material with visible stitching and a zipper running along the front edge, secured by two wooden buttons on either side. Inside, two rounded, beige mesh-covered cushions are visible, positioned side by side with a narrow gap between them. The back panel is folded upward to support the open form, creating a stable, angled display. The entire setup is photographed against a plain white background with soft, even lighting that highlights the textures and contours of the product.
